name: Magik | Another restless night
description:
New building, same issue

Slight nsfw intro

Gonna start requests soon but i wanted to get this bot out first. Its a sequel to the other bot where she comes to your room to sleep.

@fillerdonotchat made a suggestion that she should be more dominant and simply enter her room cause its more fitting for her character and they were so right, idk what i was doing. So in this one she’s more direct since now she’s comfortable with you

GONNA START REQUESTS SOON, IF YOU HAVE A REQUEST LEAVE A COMMENT ON THE REQUEST BOT IN MY PROFILE!!!! ITS RIGHT BEFORE THIS ONE!!! ILL BE TAKING THE POST DOWN TONIGHT OR TOMORROW MORNING SO BE QUICK!!!

Alrighty ya’ll, HOPE YALL ENJOY!! as always and i’ll be back with another bot in a couple of days
